parts.description: Large red frame/panel-like main body with many parallel ribs/rails and integrated end features
Green curved outer shell/cover assembly with long side wall and multiple hinge/lug features
Red main body assembly reused in step 1
Red right-side cover/bracket piece added to main body in step 1

step_analysis.assembled: A large red structural body is joined with a green curved shell/cover component. The green part aligns along the right side and lower-right region of the red body, suggesting attachment of an outer casing/side cover onto the main structural frame.

A red right-side cover/bracket piece is attached to the existing main assembly (shown as one red reused subassembly/black-box component). Geometry indicates the reused body already includes the previously attached shell from step 0, but it is not color-separated here.
